expr: rank(group_neutralize(add(multiply(0.6, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(return_on_assets, 252), 252)), multiply(0.4, ts_zscore(ts_backfill(asset_turnover, 252), 252))), subindustry)) * rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 12)))
